We structure content for common parsers and highlight missing keywords.", }, { q: "Can I export?", a: "PDF and Docx exports are supported with consistent formatting.", }, { q: "Is my data safe?", a: "We store securely, encrypt at rest, and never sell your data.", }, { q: "Does it work for any role?", a: "Yes — we tailor to your job description and background.", }, ]; export default function App() { return (
